response_constraints: Do not claim any result not established by a tool response.
Keep each call's result separate; do not transfer identifiers or fields between calls.
Report the retrieved record, availability result, and filtered list as distinct findings.
state_assertions: Persistent simulator state is unchanged by the read-only calls.

stages.purpose: Call expenses_get, expenses_availability, and expenses_list together; every argument is user-supplied, so no call consumes another call's result.

prompt: For the expense audit, run three independent read-only checks in one assistant action: retrieve exp-214; check whether "Airport Train Fare" is available on 2026-09-15 in Chicago; and list active expenses in Chicago. Do not create, update, cancel, or notify any record. Send no messages or notifications.
